responses.summary: Replaced deprecated launchctl start calls that used gui/$U/$label domain-target arguments with launchctl kickstart domain-target calls, preserving bootout+bootstrap reload semantics.
Added the same bootout+bootstrap+kickstart reload sequence to check_mem0_plist after --fix rewrites HERMES_HOME so the live mem0 LaunchAgent picks up the corrected environment.

Existing previously resolved items remain addressed in code: bash 4 guard, dynamic HERMES_BIN resolution, all ai.hermes*.plist duplicate scan with prod+mem0 exception, config setdefault port rewrites, Slack token comparison, lsof head -1, no fixed() FAIL decrement, and provider DUPES prefix handling.

Single hermes process count verification after restart remains a follow-up enhancement rather than a blocker because launchd label/PID and port/PID health checks already fail on mismatched active services.
